CONTROLS.NAME: barrel_roll
CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Trigger a complete barrel roll.

CONTROLS.NAME: recenter
CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Smoothly return to center, level flight.
Forward flight speed in units per second.
CONTROLS.NAME: fly_speed

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Nose up/down. Negative = nose down.
CONTROLS.NAME: pitch

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Roll left/right.
CONTROLS.NAME: roll_rate

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Rudder left/right. Stacks with banking.
CONTROLS.NAME: yaw_rate

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Minimum flight altitude — floor just above the terrain.
CONTROLS.NAME: min_height

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Maximum flight altitude — ceiling above the scene.
CONTROLS.NAME: max_height

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: How much to blend media with scene
CONTROLS.NAME: media_opacity

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: How strongly the media is displaced by the scene's color
CONTROLS.NAME: media_displace

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Master hue shift for the entire scene palette
CONTROLS.NAME: base_hue

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Hue of the vignette burn applied at the screen edges
CONTROLS.NAME: color_burn_hue

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Saturation of the vignette burn color
CONTROLS.NAME: color_burn_saturation

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Strength of the vignette burn at screen edges
CONTROLS.NAME: color_burn_intensity

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Bloom intensity
CONTROLS.NAME: bloom_amount

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Density of pyramid tombs in the field — higher fills more grid slots
CONTROLS.NAME: tomb_probability

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Tilt of the planetary ring plane (X/Y adjust the surface normal)
CONTROLS.NAME: ring_direction

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Direction of the main light (affects shading on sphere and ring)
CONTROLS.NAME: light_direction

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: World-space position of the gas giant (X: left/right, Y: up/down)
CONTROLS.NAME: gas_giant_position

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Blend of previous frame — creates motion trails and temporal smoothing
CONTROLS.NAME: motion_blur

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Field of view — lower is more zoomed, higher is wider and more immersive
CONTROLS.NAME: fov

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Minimum spectrum intensity to show on the ring, raise to reduce noise, lower to show more detail
CONTROLS.NAME: fft_limit

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Audio response strength (X: bass level, Y: bass hits)
CONTROLS.NAME: bass_mix

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Audio response curve (higher = more intense reaction)
CONTROLS.NAME: bass_pow

DESCRIPTION: Flyable gas giant and pyramid tomb field. Audio reactive rings. Free flight with pitch, roll, and banking turn.
TITLE: Retro 70s Gas Giant
